reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 3 (Code Verification) passed: Code at beacon_node/network/src/network_beacon_processor/rpc_methods.rs::handle_blobs_by_root_request_inner (L289-366) factually lacks epoch-based deprecation check. After FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, the handler continues processing BlobsByRoot requests normally instead of rejecting them as required by spec. Gate 4 (Exploitability): An attacker can trigger this via P2P by sending BlobsByRoot RPC request after deprecation threshold. Attack path is attacker-triggered via untrusted P2P entry point. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): 01e invariant PROP-6a4369e9-inv-035 (outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json:895-912) explicitly requires: 'blob_sidecars_by_root must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS' with assertion 'current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject'. Code does not implement this requirement. Severity calibration: Original MEDIUM severity downgraded to LOW. Impact is protocol non-compliance and resource waste, not consensus split or node crash. Does not meet MEDIUM threshold ('trivially cause network splits affecting >5% of network'). Single-client bug in Lighthouse. Security impact is limited to protocol hygiene violation and unnecessary resource consumption serving deprecated endpoints. Does not cause consensus divergence or availability issues.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: blob_sidecars_by_root must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS. (assertion: current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject)
